name: GOLFTEC Midtown Atlanta
address: 699 Spring St NW Suite 400 & 500, Atlanta, GA 30308
about: GOLFTEC is a golf instruction and club fitting center that utilizes advanced technology to provide data-driven lessons and practice sessions. The facility features indoor hitting bays equipped with launch monitors and video analysis tools designed to help golfers improve their swing mechanics and consistency. The environment is focused on structured training and professional coaching rather than open entertainment. Services include swing evaluations, personalized game plans, and custom club fittings. The company employs certified coaches, including PGA professionals, who guide players through a customized improvement journey using motion capture data and performance metrics.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion capture and video analysis
Certified coaches and personalized game plans for measurable improvement
High-tech training bays with immediate feedback on swing mechanics
Custom club fitting services to optimize equipment performance

simulator_hardware.notes: Commonly used for club fitting and data analysis at GOLFTEC locations
Referenced in technology sections for practice experiences

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for use during lessons and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: As a training studio, GOLFTEC does not typically offer food or beverage service; outside food/drink policies vary by location.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC primarily focuses on lessons and practice rather than full 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers youth coaching and junior programs, but the facility is a professional training environment, not a family entertainment center.
